title: DiscoveryEngine
description: The Discovery Engine presents a computational framework for automated scientific discovery using Active Inference principles. The system models the scientific discovery process as an inference problem...
abstract: The Discovery Engine presents a computational framework for automated scientific discovery using Active Inference principles. The system models the scientific discovery process as an inference problem, where hypotheses are generated, tested, and refined through free energy minimization, enabling structured exploration of research questions.
key_findings: The Discovery Engine presents a computational framework for automated scientific discovery using Active Inference principles..
The system models the scientific discovery process as an inference problem....
